products.title: Ceesure
products.subtitle: "An effective enhancer of immunity in Aquacultureâ€

composition.title: Composition
composition.content: • One gram of CEESURE TM contains 500 mg of concentrated and coated form of vitamin C

indications_benefits.title: Indications & Benefits
indications_benefits.content:
• CEESURE TM controls the stress by restoring the levels of ascorbate concentrations in tissues which enormously decreased due to the effect of stress factors (Stressors).
  • CEESURE TM helps in improving the growth rate by enhancing the digestion efficiency during very low or fluctuating pond water temperatures.
  • CEESURE TM promotes collagen synthesis in the fish/shrimp body and helps in quick/optimal wound repair.
  • CEESURE TM helps in the elimination of toxic effects of ammonia & other toxic gasses that gets accumulated in the pond under intensive aquaculture setup.
  • CEESURE TM supplementation in aquaculture promotes the growth of healthy brooders, facilitates proper sperm/egg formation and improves hatchability.
  • CEESURE TM promotes the development of embryo/ larvae and reduces early stage mortality in fish/shrimp.
  • CEESURE TM acts as a natural immunostimulant and activates phagocytes that control microbial attack and subsequent infections.
  • CEESURE TM acts as an excellent antioxidant. Oxidation of feed ingredients initiated by free radicals are terminated by reduction with ascorbic acid of CEESURE, as one electron is transferred to the free radical from the ascorbate anion the result being formation of the ascorbate radical.
  • CEESURE TM helps in retardation of lipid autoxidation, initiated by frre radicals such as superoxide radical (O2-â€˜), perhydroxyl radical (HO,'), hydroxyl radical (HO') and singlet oxygen (O').

dosage.title: Dosage
dosage.content:
• 0.5 to 2.0  grams per kg of feed.During stress:
  • 3.0 gm per kg feed(or) as advised by Aquaculture consultant.

Presentation: 500g and 1 Kg HDPE containers.

composition.title: Composition

Key Benefits:

  • Eliminates E.coli and salmonella infections.
  • Prevents bacterial diarrhea & shows synergistic effects with other antibiotics.
  • No cross tolerance with a broad range of antibacterial agents.
  • Little is absorbed in the alimentary tract and it is residue free.
  • Improves FCR and weight gain.
  • Controls loose droppings.
  • Controls diarrhea of unknown etiology.

indications_benefits.title: Indications & Benefits
indications_benefits.content:
• EEST supplementation enhances bioavailability of phosphorus and other minerals for fish/shrimp in pond environment.
  • EEST stabilizes the pond pH, enhances the proliferation of beneficial bacteria.
  • EEST is rich in Î²-glucan, mannoproteins, chitin and nucleic acids, which helps in immunomodulation and improvement of immune system and helps in fighting pathogens in fish/shrimp
  • EEST with its SCP bio actives acts as an excellent and well-balanced source for vitamins, Minerals, Amino acids and possesses certain lipid and carbohydrate derivatives that are very much important for metabolism.
  • EEST improves water quality and controls of bacterial infections.
  • EEST supplemented diets stimulate growth, blood biochemistry and non- specific immune responses in aquatic organisms under culture.
  • EEST improves FCR and survival rate.

products.title: Microkil Aqua
products.subtitle: "Best in Class Broad Spectrum Disinfectant for Aquaculture"

composition.title: Composition
composition.content:
• Microkill Aqua is effective in controlling the spread of viruses such as WSSV, IHHNV and MBV and also prevents the transmission of bacteria such as Vibrio sp.
  • Microkill Aqua is effective against pathogens in aquatic environment and prevents disease outbreaks in aquaculture systems.
  • Microkill Aqua prevents the growth of anerobic species in pond environment that produces noxious gases that inturn affects the healthy growth of fish/shrimp .
  • Microkill Aqua is a non toxic and  non-tainting disinfectant that does not affect plankton growth or water quality in pond.
  • Microkill Aqua is a fast acting disinfectant with very minimal contact time of less than 10 min.
  • Microkill Aqua is an ecosafe disinfectant with ingredients that can biodegrade very quickly and  does not cause any harm to the pond environment in any manner.

indications_benefits.title: Indications & Benefits
indications_benefits.content:
• Enhances decomposition of organic matter.
  • Controls the levels of ammonia, nitrite, and hydrogen sulfide in pond water.
  • Helps to achieves reduction in nitrogen and phosphorus concentrations.
  • Promotes algal growth and controls the growth of cyanobacteria (blue-green algae)
  • Enhances the availability of dissolved oxygen.
  • Promotes disease resistance and improves survival rate
  • Works even in case of high salinity and pH variance.

dosage.title: Dosage
dosage.content:
• 500 g to 2 kg per hec. or as advised by Aquaculture consulatant

indications_benefits.title: Indications & Benefits
indications_benefits.content:
• QUALIMIN Aqua Forte is a superior and improved mineral supplement for shrimp/fish.
  • QUALIMIN Aqua Forte improves immunity and prevents the onset of diseases.
  • Added probiotics and their actives in QUALIMIN Aqua Forte executes antimicrobial effects and keeps away bacterial diseases.
  • QUALIMIN Aqua Forte protects the shrimps from Loose Shell Syndrome (LSS) and decreases mortality rate.
  • QUALIMIN Aqua Forte helps in instant recovery from molting stress, strengthens the endo and exoskeleton system and helps in formation of shell/cuticle
  • QUALIMIN Aqua Forte helps in achieving enhanced growth, weight gain, survival rate and better FCR

products.title: Toxiclean Aqua
products.subtitle: "Provides An Unparalleled & Synergistic Protection from Toxic Insults"

composition.title: Composition
composition.content: • TOXICLEAN AQUA FORTE is a synergistic blend of HSCAS (zeolite), Activated Charcoal MOS, Yucca, Organic Acids and Probiotics.

indications_benefits.title: Indications & Benefits
indications_benefits.content:
• TOXICLEAN AQUA FORTE reduces obnoxious gasses and provides stress free environment that supports the growth of aquatic organisms.
  • TOXICLEAN AQUA FORTE effectively adsorbs mycotoxins and helps in their elimination.
  • TOXICLEAN AQUA FORTE acts as a mould inhibitor and prevents the formation of mycotoxins.
  • TOXICLEAN AQUA FORTE improves water quality by its high CEC and thereby enhances the healthy growth of fish/shrimp.
  • TOXICLEAN AQUA FORTE further inactivates mycotoxins that are remained after elimination by HSCAS and MOS, by arresting them in the crevices of micropores present in Activated Charcoal.
  • TOXICLEAN AQUA FORTE clears pond bottom by adsorbing and removal of wastes, bacteria and black soil from pond bottom.
  • TOXICLEAN AQUA FORTE is effective even in high ranges of salinity and pH

dosage.title: Dosage
dosage.content:
Feed Mixing:

  • Thoroughly mix 1-2 Kg per 100 Kg of feed

For pond preparation: 50 kg/ ha.

For use during culture period: 10-20 kg/ha depending on water depth in pond. (OR)

  • As suggested by Aquaculture consultant.

products.title: Toxiclean-fs
products.subtitle: "An Eco-friendly approach for Elimination of Obnoxious Gasses"

composition.title: Composition
composition.content: • TOXICLEAN-FS is a unique combination of Zeolites such as HSCAS and Bio actives from Yucca Schidigera extracts that provides high adsorption of toxic substances/noxious gasses present in water and eliminates them from pond environment to support the healthy growth of fish/shrimp.

indications_benefits.title: Indications & Benefits
indications_benefits.content:
• TOXICLEAN-FS reduces the levels of noxious gasses present in the pond and creates healthy environment that supports the growth of aquatic species being cultured.
  • TOXICLEAN-FS rejuvenates the phytoplankton growth in the pond.
  • TOXICLEAN-FS clears pond bottom by adsorbing and removal of wastes, bacteria and black soil from pond bottom.
  • TOXICLEAN-FS reduces obnoxious gasses and provides stress free environment that supports the growth of aquatic organisms.
  • TOXICLEAN-FS improves water quality by its high CEC and thereby enhances the healthy growth of fish/shrimp.
  • TOXICLEAN-FS is effective even in high ranges of salinity and pH

dosage.title: Dosage
dosage.content:
• Thoroughly mix required quantity of product with wet sand and apply over the pond with aeration.
  • For pond preparation: 50 kg/ hec.
  • For use during culture period: 10-20 kg/hec. depending on water depth in pond. (Or)
  • As suggested by Aquaculture consultant.

  • Immuno-stimulants

composition.title: Composition
composition.content:
• Yucca Schidigera (30 % )
  • Blend of probiotics and (Consortium of Ammonia Oxidizing Bacteria (AOB), Nitrite Oxidizing Bacteria (NOB) and Denitrifying Bacteria (DNB) at a potency of  10 X 109  Cfu/ g and  proven bioremediating agents

Preservatives :  Q.S.

indications_benefits.title: Indications & Benefits
indications_benefits.content:
• Alleviates ammonia stress in an ecologically safer mode and restores the levels of DO and reduces the BOD
  • Reduces the dissolved levels of obnoxious gasses.
  • YUWIN GOLD contains bacterial strains that produce enzymes which specifically act on organic matter and helps in the process of detoxification.
  • Bioactive saponins and sapogenins of yucca such as Sarsasapogenin, Furostanol, and Spirostanol are delivered in a targeted and protected form for providing long lasting and best effects
  • The bio actives of YUWIN GOLD possess anti-protozoal activity and natural surfactants in the composition  allows better nutrient utilization by bacteria that digest waste materials at pond bottom.
  • Microbes present in YUWIN GOLD helps in Bioremediation and improve the water quality by breaking down pollutants and waste.
  • YUWIN GOLD promotes the growth of phytoplanktons and zoo planktons
  • Improves gut micro flora and aids in better utilization of nutrients
  • YUWIN GOLD improves and purifies overall water quality
  • Promotes healthy growth of prawns, fishes and eventually increases their overall harvest yield.

dosage.title: Dosage
dosage.content:
• Use 300 to 500 gm per hec. by thoroughly mixing it with sand by sprinkling water and broadcast evenly to the entire water spread area of the pond.
  • Repeat the application once in 15 days up to 90 days of culture and once in 10 days after 90 days of culture.

Presentation: 1 Kg HDPE Containers.

composition.title: Composition
composition.content: • Yucca Schidigera extracts, Synergistic blend of probiotics and bioremediation agents.

indications_benefits.title: Indications & Benefits
indications_benefits.content:
• Relieves aquatic animals from deleterious effects of ammonia stress.
  • Neutralizes off-flavours from water bodies.
  • Improves gut health and improves nutrient assimilation.
  • YUWIN restricts further production of ammonia by inhibiting urease activity
  • Bioactive saponins and sapogenins in YUWIN supports the growth of micro biota at the pond bottom and helps effectively in bioremidiation
  • Improves steroid hormone synthesis as the composition is rich in Trigogenin.
  • YUWIN is an ecosafe product that improves and purifies overall water quality

dosage.title: Dosage
dosage.content: Presentation:  1 Kg pouch & 1 Ltr. HDPE Containers.
